# Copilot Instructions

## Project

This project is a personal student portfolio website.

Tech stack:
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Vanilla JavaScript

Do not use:
- React
- Vue
- Angular
- Bootstrap
- Tailwind
- jQuery

---

## Editing Rules

Always:
- Edit only the files I request.
- Modify only the requested section.
- Reuse existing code whenever possible.
- Keep the current project structure.
- Keep responses concise.

Never:
- Rewrite the entire file.
- Change unrelated code.
- Rename files without permission.
- Add unnecessary code or dependencies.
- Duplicate HTML, CSS, or JavaScript.

If only one function or selector changes, return only that change.

---

## Code Style

HTML
- Use semantic HTML.
- Keep markup clean.

CSS
- Reuse existing classes.
- Avoid duplicate selectors.
- Use Flexbox or Grid when appropriate.
- Use CSS variables if they already exist.
- Keep animations smooth and lightweight.

JavaScript
- Use modern vanilla JavaScript.
- Write small, reusable functions.
- Avoid global variables.

---

## Design

Style:
- Fantasy
- Premium
- Elegant
- Modern
- Responsive

Primary colors:
- Black
- Purple
- Gold

Design inspiration:
- Infinity Nikki: https://infinitynikki.infoldgames.com
  - Elegant fantasy atmosphere
  - Soft lighting
  - Premium UI

- Heartopia: https://heartopia.xd.com
  - Cozy layouts
  - Rounded components
  - Friendly interface

- Genshin Impact: https://genshin.hoyoverse.com
  - Navigation style
  - Spacing
  - Smooth animations

Use these websites only as inspiration.
Do not copy assets, layouts, or copyrighted content.

---

## Performance

Prefer:
- Small edits
- Reusable code
- Simple solutions

Avoid:
- Large refactors
- Unnecessary complexity
- Unused code

---

## Response Style

Before generating code:
- Briefly explain the approach in one or two sentences.

When generating code:
- Return only the code that needs to change.
- Do not include unchanged code.
- Keep explanations short.
